title: The Guardrails Designed to Protect U.S.-Iran Talks
summary_full: The U.S. and Iran have agreed to set up a Strait of Hormuz hotline and a “de-confliction cell” for Lebanon, according to mediators from Pakistan and Qatar.
summary_public: The U.S. and Iran have agreed to set up a Strait of Hormuz hotline and a “de-confliction cell” for Lebanon, according to mediators from Pakistan and Qatar.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: The U.S. and Iran have agreed to set up a Strait of Hormuz hotline
